mapper.select: select ledger_id as ledgerId, order_id as orderId, item_id as itemId, channel_id as channelId, contest_id as contestId, rule_id as ruleId, list_amount as listAmount, net_pay_amount as netPayAmount, service_fee as serviceFee, rebate_base as rebateBase, rebate_amount as rebateAmount, direction as direction, status as status, event_end_time as eventEndTime from jst_rebate_ledger where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' order by ledger_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_rebate_ledger set status = 'rolled_back', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where order_id = #{orderId} and direction = 'positive' and status in ('pending_accrual', 'withdrawable', 'in_review') and del_flag = '0'
